scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @muralist/config && npm run build --workspace @muralist/core && npm run build --workspace @muralist/api && npm run build --workspace @muralist/web && npm run build --workspace @muralist/mobile
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @muralist/config && npm run build --workspace @muralist/core && npm run test --workspace @muralist/config && npm run test --workspace @muralist/core && npm run test --workspace @muralist/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @muralist/config && npm run typecheck --workspace @muralist/config && npm run build --workspace @muralist/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @muralist/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @muralist/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @muralist/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @muralist/mobile
